CustomField.label: Found Value Formula
CustomField.description: Optional, Record formula checks only. A scalar formula whose result is shown as the "Found" value on the result row (the left side of a comparison — what the record has). Leave blank to keep the default behavior (no Found value). The Pass/Fail Formula still decides pass/fail. Example: BLANKVALUE(Debit_Total__c, 0).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. Scalar formula shown as "Found" on the row (e.g. BLANKVALUE(Debit_Total__c, 0)). Pass/Fail is still decided by the Pass/Fail Formula. Blank = no Found value.
